zh.Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯
zh.Meynell Langley, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾明日香 密爾
zh.Old Dalby, Leicestershire, England: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾笛卡爾 達爾比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Meynell於1172年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾笛卡爾 達爾比時，他的父親Steven De Meynell22歲，母親Joan De Ros10歲。他於1204年與Emma Malebisse在英國英格蘭越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1206年1月30日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾明日香 密爾享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Meynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from one of the French places named Mesnil, from Old French mesnil (Latin * mansionile, a diminutive of mansio ‘abode, habitation’), used of the country domain where a noble lived with his family and retainers. As a surname it may also be used of a member of the household, retainer. Some of the bearers listed below may belong to (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Continental Germanic female personal name Maginhild.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Meynell was born in 1172, in Old Dalby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Steven De Meynell, was 22 and his mother, Joan De Ros, was 10. He married Emma Malebisse in 1204, in Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 30 January 1206, in Langley Mill, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Meynell est né en 1172, à Old Dalby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Steven De Meynell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan De Ros, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Emma Malebisse en 1204, à Acaster Malbis, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1206, à Langley Mill, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Meynellが1172年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアオルド ダルビーで生まれた時，父Steven De Meynellは22歳，母Joan De Rosは10歳であった。1204年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアカスター マルビスでEmma Malebisseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1206年1月30日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアラングリー ミルで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Meynell(이)가 1172년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 드 다비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Steven De Meynell(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Ros(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1204년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 악아스터 맬비스에서 Emma Malebisse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1206년 1월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 랭글리 미에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Meynell родился в 1172 г. в местности олд далби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Steven De Meynell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan De Ros, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Malebisse в 1204 г. в местности акастир малбис, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 30 января 1206 г. в местности лангли милл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
